items.meaning_kr: 여러 사람이 함께 어울려 지내는 생활
같은 목적이나 지역을 공유하며 함께 살아가는 집단
많은 사람에게 작품이나 계획 등을 받아 모음
공모하여 모인 작품을 전시하거나 평가하는 행사

items.meaning_en: One's speech or behavior being courteous and humble.
items.e_definition: One's speech or behavior being courteous and humble.

items.meaning_en: An official procedure recognized by a country or society.
items.e_definition: An official procedure recognized by a country or society.

items.meaning_kr: 사람의 손이나 기계로 원료를 가공하여 상품이나 재료를 만드는 산업
items.meaning_en: An industry that makes goods or materials by manufacturing raw material by hand or machine.
items.e_definition: An industry that makes goods or materials by manufacturing raw material by hand or machine.

items.meaning_kr: 무대에서 노래나 연극 등을 보이는 일
사람들이 쉬거나 놀 수 있도록 만든 공간

items.meaning_en: Relating to a country or society.
items.e_definition: Relating to a country or society.

items.meaning_en: A daughter of a king and queen.
items.e_definition: A daughter of a king and queen.

items.meaning_kr: 글을 쓰거나 공부할 때 쓰는 책
산업이나 교통의 발달 등으로 사람과 생물의 생활환경이 입게 되는 여러 가지 피해
items.meaning_en: Damage to people and the ecosystem due to the development of industry, transportation, etc.
items.e_definition: Damage to people and the ecosystem due to the development of industry, transportation, etc.

items.meaning_kr: 회사에서 업무의 종류에 따라 나눈 부서의 하나
items.meaning_en: A division unit in an organization which is divided by the characteristics of duties in a company.
items.e_definition: A division unit in an organization which is divided by the characteristics of duties in a company.

items.meaning_kr: 몸이 힘들 정도로 지나치게 일을 하는 것. 또는 그로 인한 심한 피로
items.meaning_en: The act of working to a degree of fatigue, or the fatigue caused by intense work.
items.e_definition: The act of working to a degree of fatigue, or the fatigue caused by intense work.

items.meaning_kr: 가르치거나 배워야 할 지식을 분야에 따라 나누는 갈래
items.meaning_en: Division of knowledge needed for teaching or learning according to categories.
items.e_definition: Division of knowledge needed for teaching or learning according to categories.
